comment: Asset registry for Temporal Replay 2026 Badge. The badge fetches this file once a day (when Settings -> asset_registry_url is set) and surfaces each entry in the Asset Library screen. Add new entries by PR — no firmware change required. Big-file assets (≳ 100 KB) ship as GitHub Release attachments via release-assets/manifest.json + .github/workflows/release-firmware.yml; their URL stays stable across firmware releases via the /releases/latest/download/<name> pattern.

assets.name: DOOM 1 Shareware
assets.description: Original 1993 shareware episode. Required for the DOOM tile.
